statement.markdown: Given a sorted array with a single swap, fix the buggy bubble sort implementation to sort the array correctly.
statement.inputFormat: Input is a sorted array with a single swap.
statement.notes: Use the bubble sort algorithm to sort the array. The swap is in the first two elements.

examples.explanation: The array is already sorted, but the swap ruins the sorting. The task is to fix this.

hints.text: Check for adjacent elements in the array.

editorial.title: Editorial
editorial.intuition: First sort the entire array, then swap the two elements.
editorial.bruteForce: Sort the entire array and then swap the elements.
editorial.optimalSolution: Use a single loop to sort the array and swap the two elements.
editorial.proofOfCorrectness: The solution works by swapping the first two elements in each iteration, effectively sorting the array.
editorial.dryRun: Start with [1 3 2 4]. Sort the first two elements [1 3] and then swap them with the first two elements of the array, resulting in [1 2 3 4].
